to: me, jerry lefcourt, jack goldberger, bruce lyons
subject: please email comments
body:
The police , categorically refused to attend a
scheduled  meeting  convened by the prosecutor  for
the sole purpose of reviewing the exculpatory evidence
. The grand jury and the prosecutor in contrast, are
required by law to carefully consider  both sides. The
prosecutor as legal and ethical " gatekeeper", and the
grand jury comprised
of twenty six citizens as ultimate decision
maker..Each in their capacity  considered the totality
of  the evidence and eventually 
decided on only a single charge of solicitation.
1.They
recognized the signifigance of the fact that Mr
Epstein passed an extensive  lie detector test , given
by one the
states  most reknowned and toughest practioners, 2
.THe prosecutor and jury members  reviewed all the
police reports, , comprising  the detectives version
of unsubstantiated allegations,in addition to  third
party relevant  documentary evidence , including
federal  criminal records,prior misrepresentations of
age, law enforcecment reports,and both  taped
confessions and e-mails .It is  apparent that all the 
 exculpatory evidence was  deliberately withheld from
the public release, by the police in order to simply
embarass Mr. Epstein. Some  poignant examples 1. The 
missing piece of the broken "device",salaciously 
described in the report as a sex toy, found during a
search of Mr Epsteins  garbage and then officially
referred to in the  report  as "commonly used for
vaginal or anal stimulation" was the only  relevant
item  found during a thorough search of his house .The
purported "device" turned out  to be nothing
more than an ordinary salad spoon. The police chose
however,not to 
amend their  report ... The video cameras they
refer to  in their report, were actually set up with
the
help of their own   swat team in order to
apprehend  a serial burglar they deemed potentially 
dangerous. The burglar was eventually caught, . As
the videos were grainy, Mr Epstein , in appreciation,
donated $36,000.,   to enable, the police department 
to purchase for their future  use, advanced digital
video enhancement
equiptment ,They did so. They , however,   fail to
mention 
that the  burglar in question ,was  one of their
interviewed 
witnesses. They more importantly  fail to report
the fact that the woman fabricating  virtually all the
more
serious allegations,when required to repeat those same
fabrications  under oath ,and threat of perjury ,
refused to do so. In addition they 
 withheld from the report , and the prosecutors
themselves  , that
this very same witness had both been  recently
arrested in palm beach for drug possession and only
shortly therafter terminated by her employer for
theft. Her taped confession, and her employers
statement that she was  virtually incapable of telling
the truth, coupled with her boasting that she and her
friends would become really really rich,  were facts
carefully considered by the prosecutor and grand jury
in their decision to only charge one count of
solicitation but  apparently  purposefully  ignored by
the police.   

__
